entry.title: IDC 697DCK22D00001 (P00012) awarded to CDW GOVERNMENT LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MODIFICATION TO INCORPORATE EXECUTIVE ORDER CHANGES.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC 697DCK22D00001 (P00013) awarded to CDW GOVERNMENT LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO: - EXTEND THE CONTRACT COMPLETION DATE AND ORDERING PERIOD END DATE BY NINE MONTHS FROM 4/21/2025 TO 1/31/2026. - INCREASE THE CONTRACT CEILING AMOUNT BY $172,805,097.00 FROM $413,281,941.00 TO $586,087,038.00

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC 697DCK22D00001 (P00014) awarded to CDW GOVERNMENT LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO CHANGE THE CONTACTING OFFICER AND CONTRACTING OFFICER REPRESENTATIVE.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC 697DCK22D00001 (P00015) awarded to CDW GOVERNMENT LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: TO INCORPORATE AMS CLAUSE 3.3.1-40 ELECTRONIC SUBMISSION OF PAYMENT REQUESTS (INTERIM DECEMBER 2025) AND AMS CLAUSE 3.8.9-8 PROHIBITION ON PROCUREMENT OR OPERATION OF COVERED UNMANNED AIRCRAFT SYSTEMS (INTERIM DECEMBER 2025) INTO THE CONTRACT.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC 697DCK22D00001 (P00016) awarded to CDW GOVERNMENT LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: EXTEND THE CONTRACT COMPLETION DATE AND ORDERING PERIOD END DATE BY THREE (3) MONTHS FROM 1/31/2026 TO 4/30/2026.
